The ultimate midfield war: Xavi vs. Pirlo. Who REALLY ran the show?

Xavi: Barca's tiki-taka pulse. His 90%+ passing accuracy was a bad day. Orchestrated 4 UCLs! Never wasted a touch, always probing.

Pirlo: The deep-lying maestro. His long-range vision and free-kicks redefined the role. Milan & Juve's engine room. Made impossible passes look effortless.

One controlled the tempo, the other carved defenses open. Whose peak dominance was more profound? 🤔 #PastGlories #MidfieldMaestros
